name: Cooling Tower - Model CT-400
description: Induced draft crossflow cooling tower for condenser water system
pdf_content:
COOLING TOWER SUBMITTAL DATA
Project: Data Center Cooling Infrastructure

EQUIPMENT DATA
Manufacturer: TowerCool Industries
Model: CT-400-IX
Type: Induced Draft Crossflow Cooling Tower
Construction: Fiberglass with SS hardware

THERMAL PERFORMANCE
Heat Rejection: 400 tons @ 95°F/85°F/78°F (EWT/LWT/WB)
Water Flow Rate: 1,200 GPM
Approach Temperature: 7°F
Design Wet Bulb: 78°F
Drift Loss: 0.001% of circulating flow

FAN SYSTEM
Fan Type: Axial propeller, belt drive
Fan Diameter: 12 feet
Motor: 30 HP, 1800 RPM, TEFC
Voltage: 460V/3PH/60Hz
Sound Level: 82 dBA at 50 ft
Vibration Switch: Standard

WATER DISTRIBUTION
Distribution Type: Gravity flow with nozzles
Nozzle Material: PVC
Hot Water Basin: Fiberglass with SS weirs
Cold Water Basin: Concrete with epoxy coating
Basin Capacity: 450 gallons
Makeup Water: 2" float valve
Overflow: 4" connection
Drain: 3" connection

FILL MEDIA
Type: PVC film fill
Thickness: 12 inches
Flame Spread: <25 per ASTM E-84

COMMISSIONING REQUIREMENTS
• Verify structural installation and anchor bolts
• Check fan rotation and belt tension
• Adjust water distribution for uniform flow
• Verify drift eliminator installation
• Test basin level controls and float valve
• Measure fan motor current draw
• Check vibration levels at design flow
• Verify chemical treatment system operation
• Test basin heater operation (freeze protection)
• Perform thermal performance test
• Adjust bleed rate for cycles of concentration
• Document water treatment parameters

QUALITY ASSURANCE
CTI Certified Performance
FM Approved for fire protection
ASHRAE 90.1 compliant

Submitted: February 10, 2024
By: MEP Contractor
Page 1 of 3
